items.title: Victory for Claire Valdez
items.summary: The artist and union organizer sweeps the NYC primary, and what makes an antiquities looter loot?

items.title: Don’t Ask Lari Pittman What His Work Is “About”
items.summary: The Colombian-American painter discusses his new body of work, the complexity of queerness, and the reprieve of the analog.

items.title: Remembering Frayda Feldman, James Wagner, and Melodee Strong
items.summary: This week, we honor an Andy Warhol print expert, a tireless art collector, and a beloved Minneapolis muralist.

items.title: Inside the Mind of an Antiquities Looter
items.summary: "The Man Who Stole the Gods" author Matthew Campbell discusses Western collectors' rapacious hunger for ancient Cambodian art and the sheer violence it took to satiate it.
